## Lifecycle Checklist

- [ ] Schema identity fields preserved (`*_id`, `schema_version`, `created_at`, `updated_at`)
- [ ] Templates updated to match any schema changes
- [ ] At least one example updated or added
- [ ] No private repo names, escalation tiers, or machine-specific paths committed
- [ ] ContextGuard adapter contract satisfied (if adapter touched)
- [ ] `schema_version` bumped if breaking field changes introduced
